info.name: SMARTUR API
info.description:
Complete API collection for SMARTUR - Sistema de Gestión Turística. Includes all API v2 endpoints and MODELO (ML service) endpoints. Use the **SMARTUR - Local** or **SMARTUR - Production** environment to switch between environments.

## Authentication
1. Use **Login (Paso 1 - OTP)** then **Two-Factor (Valida OTP)** to get a JWT token.
2. The token is stored in `{{auth_token}}` variable.
3. All authenticated requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{auth_token}}`.

## Test Credentials
- Tourist: `turista@smartur.demo` / `Password1a` (role 2)
- Admin: `martinlaraolivares@gmail.com` / `Password1a` (role 1)
